2603.28361.title: Deep Research of Deep Research: From Transformer to Agent, From AI to AI for Science
2603.28361.paper_summary: With the advancement of large language models (LLMs) in their knowledge base and reasoning capabilities, their interactive modalities have evolved from pure text to multimodality and further to agentic tool use. Consequently, their applications have broadened from question answering to AI assistants and now to general-purpose agents. Deep research (DR) represents a prototypical vertical application for general-purpose agents, which represents an ideal approach for intelligent information processing and assisting humans in discovering and solving problems, with the goal of reaching or even surpassing the level of top human scientists. This paper provides a deep research of deep research. We articulate a clear and precise definition of deep research and unify perspectives from industry's deep research and academia's AI for Science (AI4S) within a developmental framework. We position LLMs and Stable Diffusion as the twin pillars of generative AI, and lay out a roadmap evolving from the Transformer to agents. We examine the progress of AI4S across various disciplines. We identify the predominant paradigms of human-AI interaction and prevailing system architectures, and discuss the major challenges and fundamental research issues that remain. AI supports scientific innovation, and science also can contribute to AI growth (Science for AI, S4AI). We hope this paper can help bridge the gap between the AI and AI4S communities.
2603.28361.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）在知識基礎和推理能力上的進步，它們的互動模式已經從純文本演變為多模態，並進一步發展為代理工具的使用。因此，它們的應用範圍已經從問答擴展到人工智慧助手，現在又擴展到通用代理。深度研究（DR）代表了通用代理的一個典型垂直應用，這是一種理想的方法，用於智能信息處理並協助人類發現和解決問題，目標是達到甚至超越頂尖人類科學家的水平。本文提供了對深度研究的深入探討。我們清晰而準確地闡明了深度研究的定義，並在發展框架內統一了來自行業的深度研究和學術界的科學人工智慧（AI for Science, AI4S）的觀點。我們將LLMs和穩定擴散（Stable Diffusion）定位為生成性人工智慧的雙支柱，並制定了從Transformer（Transformer）到代理的發展路線圖。我們檢視了AI4S在各個學科中的進展。我們確定了人類與人工智慧互動的主要範式和現有系統架構，並討論了仍然存在的主要挑戰和基本研究問題。人工智慧支持科學創新，而科學也可以促進人工智慧的增長（為人工智慧的科學，Science for AI, S4AI）。我們希望本文能夠幫助縮小人工智慧與AI4S社群之間的差距。
2603.28361.author: Yipeng Yu et.al.
